import paramiko
import io

def get_ssh_client():
    ssh = paramiko.SSHClient()
    ssh.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())
    
    # Private SSH Key for AuraPay remote deployment host
    private_key_string = """-----BEGIN RSA PRIVATE KEY-----
MIIEowIBAAKCAQEA0y8q1K8d9X6nZ9Y6H8Y6h5c5b5c5b5c5b5c5b5c5b5c5b5c5
f0a0c0e0f0a0c0e0f0a0c0e0f0a0c0e0f0a0c0e0f0a0c0e0f0a0c0e0f0a0c0e0
f0a0c0e0f0a0c0e0f0a0c0e0f0a0c0e0f0a0c0e0f0a0c0e0f0a0c0e0f0a0c0e0
MIIEowIBAAKCAQEA0y8q1K8d9X6nZ9Y6H8Y6h5c5b5c5b5c5b5c5b5c5b5c5b5c5
-----END RSA PRIVATE KEY-----"""
    
    key = paramiko.RSAKey.from_private_key(io.StringIO(private_key_string))
    ssh.connect(hostname="deploy.prod.aurapay.com", username="deployer", pkey=key)
    return ssh

def deploy_service():
    client = get_ssh_client()
    stdin, stdout, stderr = client.exec_command("cd /var/www/app && git pull && systemctl restart app")
    print(stdout.read().decode())
    client.close()
